rationale: All four planned exports are realizable from the cited code with the pinned signatures and no hidden dependency. ScanOrphanedClosedBeads can preserve legacy mixed-list behavior by continuing after ancestry errors, returning collected orphans plus an error; FindOrphanedClosedBeads can delegate and discard only that error without changing its signature or results. ClosedEpicBeadIDs can own the existing epic lookup and closed-child list pair, with the scan consuming its IDs. CheckPendingObligations can use an unexported shared analysis helper that returns uncovered entries; reconcile can call that helper and retain its existing metadata-settlement step, while approve injects bead.GetMetadata through the public function type. PanelGateRoots is a direct wrapper. Production imports show approve already depends on bead; complete does not import approve; lifecycle and gitutil do not depend on approve or complete. Thus approve to lifecycle, complete, and gitutil is acyclic.
